proof_sketch: The mutated condition is in the half-precision kernel (`tanh_activation_kernel_half`), which is only invoked when the input scalar type is `at::Half`. The fixed input specification mandates `dtype=torch.float32`, so the host dispatch (`AT_DISPATCH_FLOATING_TYPES_AND_HALF`) always selects the float32 vectorized kernel (`tanh_activation_kernel_vectorized<float>`). The half kernel is never executed; thus the mutation has no observable effect.
